## Question or invariant changed

<!-- One bounded change. -->

## Evidence and verification

<!-- Commands, fixtures, hashes, failures, and relevant limitations. -->

## Compatibility and security impact

<!-- Schema migration, capability changes, trust-boundary changes, or none. -->

## AI disclosure

<!-- Systems used and what they contributed. “None” is acceptable. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes.
- [ ] No confidential or unpublished material is included.
- [ ] Failures and exclusions are preserved.
- [ ] The reviewer is not being represented as independent if they share the submission's derivation.
